name: Artichoke Bottoms Tahitian
recipeIngredient: 4 artichoke bottoms, canned or cooked (4 to 6)
1 package frozen french cut green beans, or 2 cups fresh french cut green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over moderate heat. Add the onion and cook until translucent.
2. Stir in the tomato, green beans, curry powder, salt, pepper, and chicken stock. Simmer until the green beans are tender.
3. Meanwhile, microwave or sauté the artichoke bottoms in broth until heated through.
4. Fill each artichoke bottom with the bean mixture and sprinkle with toasted almonds.
5. Serve 4 to 6 people.
